prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-8OZFLASKFUNNEL-BUN Product Type: HIP_FLASK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2pc Stainless Steel Flask and Funnel Set for Hiking Camping Outdoor Gear, (2 Sizes) (8oz) Description: Take your favorite beverage anywhere with the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Flask and Funnel Bundle. Crafted from durable 201 stainless steel, choose from a 6oz or 8oz flask that are built to resist rust and corrosion, while maintaining a polished, modern look. The included 304 stainless steel funnel ensures mess-free filling, so you never waste a drop.

The stainless steel flasks features a slim, curved profile that fits comfortably into pockets, bags, or packs, making it the perfect companion for camping, hiking, concerts, tailgates and more. A secure, screw-on cap is attached to the flask to prevent leaks and keep your lid from getting lost.

Whether you’re gifting a groomsmen party, preparing for outdoor adventures, or simply looking for a reliable and stylish way to carry your favorite liquor, this stainless steel flask and funnel set is a practical choice. Durable, portable, timeless, and ready to go wherever you do. Search Terms: Flask; whiskey; small funnel; flask funnel; outdoor camping hiking backpacking hunting fishing gear; tailgating camping essentials; camping accessories; gifts for dad; groomsmen gifts; pocket travel flask; mens gift set Features: - CONVENIENT STAINLESS STEEL FUNNEL - Funnel features a 1.5" mouth and 3/8" spout for a clean, spill-free pour - perfectly sized for filling flasks or small bottles with your favorite spirits. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Flask made from 201 stainless steel for lasting durability, resistance to rust and corrosion, and a sleek brushed finish that looks great and stands up to everyday use. - PREMIUM FUNNEL INCLUDED - 304 stainless steel funnel makes filling the flask easy and spill-free, ensuring every drop counts. Perfect size for the flask opening. - PORTABLE AND COMPACT SIZE – Available in 6oz or 8oz capacity, the slim, curved design fits comfortably in a pocket, jacket, or small bag - ideal for travel, hiking, camping, festivals, and more. - SECURE SCREW ON CAP – Attached leak-proof lid prevents spills and loss of the cap, giving you peace of mind when carrying your favorite spirits. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8oz Stainless Steel Flask and Funnel Set

tokens.name: Stainless Steel Flask and Funnel Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Piece Set, Leak-Proof Cap, Durable 201 Stainless Steel, Included Funnel, Portable Camping Hiking

openai.title_differentiation: 201 Stainless Steel Flask, 304 Stainless Steel Funnel, Leak-Proof Screw Cap, Pocket Travel Size, Rust Resistant
